info.title: BrewPage API
info.description: REST API for BrewPage — HTML/KV/JSON/file hosting platform. Publish and manage web content, key-value data, JSON documents, and files with short URLs, password protection, and real-time statistics.

tags.name: Gallery
tags.description: Browse public content from the 'public' namespace without password protection

tags.name: JSON
tags.description: JSON document store with up to 10,000 docs per collection

tags.name: HTML
tags.description: HTML page hosting with markdown support

tags.name: KV
tags.description: Key-Value store with up to 1000 keys per namespace

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File hosting up to 5 MB per file, 1000 files per namespace

tags.name: Sites
tags.description: Multi-file HTML site hosting via ZIP or folder upload (up to 5 MB per file, 1000 files per site)

get.description: Returns the value and last update timestamp for a specific key

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param (alternative to X-Password header)

put.description: Creates or updates a key in the store; max 1000 keys per store

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

delete.description: Removes a single key from the store; deleting the last key does not remove the store

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

get.description: Returns raw JSON content with application/json content type

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param (alternative to X-Password header)

put.description: Replaces document content; requires the owner token returned at creation

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

get.description: Returns rendered HTML content; password-protected pages require X-Password header or ?p= query param

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param (alternative to X-Password header)

put.description: Replaces page content; requires the owner token returned at creation

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

delete.description: Permanently removes page and frees the short URL

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

get.description: Returns all KV stores owned by the given token in the namespace. Returns empty list without token

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token to filter by ownership. Without token returns empty list

post.description: Creates a new store with an initial key-value pair and returns a shareable link. Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace. Default: public. Pages in 'public' without password appear in gallery. Custom namespace is created automatically

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time to live in days (1-365, default 5). Store auto-deletes after expiry

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password. Empty = public store visible in gallery. With password = hidden from gallery, viewers must enter password or pass ?p= in URL

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner. If omitted, a new token is generated

get.description: Returns documents owned by the given token. Empty list without token

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token to filter by ownership. Without token returns empty list

post.description: Stores any valid JSON and returns a shareable link. Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace. Default: public. Pages in 'public' without password appear in gallery. Custom namespace is created automatically

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time to live in days (1-365, default 5). Document auto-deletes after expiry

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password. Empty = public document visible in gallery. With password = hidden from gallery, viewers must enter password or pass ?p= in URL

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner. If omitted, a new token is generated

post.description: Stores HTML or markdown content and returns a shareable link. Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace. Default: public. Pages in 'public' without password appear in gallery. Custom namespace is created automatically

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time to live in days (1-365, default 5). Page auto-deletes after expiry

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Content format: 'html' (default), 'markdown', or 'md'. Markdown is rendered to styled HTML with github-markdown-css

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password. Empty = public page visible in gallery. With password = hidden from gallery, viewers must enter password or pass ?p= in URL

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner. If omitted, a new token is generated

get.description: Returns files owned by the given token. Empty list without token

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token to filter by ownership. Without token returns empty list

post.description: Stores a file via multipart upload and returns a download link. Only safe file types accepted. Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace. Default: public. Pages in 'public' without password appear in gallery. Custom namespace is created automatically

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time to live in days (1-365, default 5). File auto-deletes after expiry

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password. Empty = public file visible in gallery. With password = hidden from gallery, viewers must enter password or pass ?p= in URL

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner. If omitted, a new token is generated

400.description: Invalid request or file too large

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password for protected resources

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password (query alternative to X-Password header)

parameters.name: dl
parameters.description: Force download as attachment

parameters.description: Access password for protected resources

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password (query alternative to X-Password header)

parameters.name: dl
parameters.description: Force download as attachment

get.description: Serves the IndexNow verification key file for search engine crawlers
Returns today's and all-time creation/view counts with per-type breakdown
Generates sitemap with static pages and all public gallery entries. Caddy should route /sitemap.xml to this endpoint
Returns all key names and total count for a store

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param (alternative to X-Password header)

get.description: Lists public pages (public namespace, no password) with optional case-insensitive search by title/tags

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search by title or tags

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Items per page (max 100)

get.description: Returns file inline for previewable types (images, PDF, media) or as attachment. Add ?dl=1 to force download.

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param (alternative to X-Password header)

parameters.name: dl
parameters.description: Force download as attachment

delete.description: Permanently removes the file from storage

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for update and delete

post.description: Upload a multi-file HTML site as a ZIP archive or as individual files with paths. Returns a link to the published site

parameters.name: ns
parameters.description: Namespace. Default: public

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time to live in days (1-30, default 5)

parameters.name: entry
parameters.description: Entry file path override (default: auto-detect index.html)

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Reuse existing owner token to group entities under one owner

paths.description: Relative paths for each file (must match files order)

400.description: Invalid request, no HTML files, or limits exceeded

get.description: Returns site metadata and file list. Requires owner token

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation

delete.description: Permanently removes the site and all its files from storage

parameters.name: X-Owner-Token
parameters.description: Owner token returned at creation. Required for delete

get.description: Serves an individual file from the site with correct content type

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Relative file path within the site. May contain slashes for nested paths, e.g.: assets/css/main.css

parameters.name: X-Password
parameters.description: Access password via header

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Access password via query param

value.description: New value for the key (max 1 MB)

link.description: Public short URL for this key
Public short URL for browser viewing

content.description: New HTML content to replace existing page

link.description: Public short URL for browser viewing

value.description: Value for the initial key (max 1 MB)

link.description: Public short URL for the initial key

ownerToken.description: Secret token required for upsert and delete operations. Store it safely -- cannot be recovered

link.description: Public short URL for browser viewing

ownerToken.description: Secret token required for update and delete operations. Store it safely -- cannot be recovered

content.description: HTML or markdown content to publish

link.description: Public short URL for browser viewing

ownerToken.description: Secret token required for update and delete operations. Store it safely -- cannot be recovered

link.description: Public short URL for browser download

ownerToken.description: Secret token required for delete operation. Store it safely -- cannot be recovered

createdToday.description: Resources created in the last 24 hours

type.description: Resource type: html, json, kv, or file

keyCount.description: Number of keys in the store

createdAt.description: When the first key in the store was created

keys.description: All key names in the store

updatedAt.description: When the value was last written or updated

type.description: Resource type: html, json, kv, or file

title.description: Display title derived from content or filename

total.description: Total number of matching items across all pages

link.description: Public short URL for browser download

entryFile.description: Entry HTML file resolved from the upload (e.g. index.html)

link.description: Public URL to view the site

ownerLink.description: API URL for programmatic access (info, delete)

ownerToken.description: Secret token required for info and delete operations. Store it safely -- cannot be recovered

entryFile.description: Entry HTML file resolved from the upload

files.description: List of all files in the site

path.description: Relative file path within the site

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the error occurred
